textPlain: Looking at the AM5 pinout[0], it looks like those pins are VDDCR and VSS with a little bit of PCIe sprinkled in towards the outer edges (assuming the printed arrow on the CPU corresponds with 1,A on the pinout). I don't know anything about electricity so I've got nothing else to add.[0] https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/2/2d/Socket_A...
